channel.title: Asides on Deuts Log
channel.description: Recent content in Asides on Deuts Log

item.title: Setting Up Self-Hosted Obsidian LiveSync
item.description:
Setting Up Self-Hosted Obsidian LiveSync

DB Tech shows how to set up Obsidian LiveSync using CouchDB via Docker.
item.content:encoded:
Setting Up Self-Hosted Obsidian LiveSync

DB Tech shows how to set up Obsidian LiveSync using CouchDB via Docker.

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ2TXWSDEGMGRM5TQMANDPV4
item.description: I subscribed to Amazon Prime because of NBA live coverage, but they apparently are not covering any live games for the rest of the first round of the 2026 Playoffs. What a waste of money!
item.content:encoded: I subscribed to Amazon Prime because of NBA live coverage, but they apparently are not covering any live games for the rest of the first round of the 2026 Playoffs. What a waste of money!

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ26SN2RP3NTGT3M169AJ8B9
item.description: This AI thing really gets confusing fast. #ChatGPT / OpenAI or #Claude or #Gemini. If Claude: Chat, Cowork or Code. If Code: CLI, Desktop or VS Code. Then Pro etc. vs. API? Please, can we just have one good product and move on?
item.content:encoded: This AI thing really gets confusing fast. #ChatGPT / OpenAI or #Claude or #Gemini. If Claude: Chat, Cowork or Code. If Code: CLI, Desktop or VS Code. Then Pro etc. vs. API? Please, can we just have one good product and move on?

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KQ1TTDBDEW6EFGDF4GK31K68
item.description: @nextgraph Sorry about that. The original link was to my publicly shared notes. I updated it based on the 2 app’s current capabilities, and made a blog post. You may check it here: deuts.org/∞
item.content:encoded: @nextgraph Sorry about that. The original link was to my publicly shared notes. I updated it based on the 2 app’s current capabilities, and made a blog post. You may check it here: deuts.org/∞

item.title: @deuts@deuts.one 01KPWHEYNAEQR2628GR7EM1BNQ
item.description: #PangolinTunnel is a great software. Loving it over other reverse proxy apps. But this resource usage is just so annoying.
item.content:encoded: #PangolinTunnel is a great software. Loving it over other reverse proxy apps. But this resource usage is just so annoying.

item.title: n8n Workflow for LinkedIn Job Search
item.description:
n8n Workflow for LinkedIn Job Search

An autonomous AI agent that runs every weekday morning, scrapes LinkedIn for fresh job postings, scores them against your profile, and delivers matched jobs with ready-to-send cold emails directly to your Google Sheet and inbox.
item.content:encoded:
n8n Workflow for LinkedIn Job Search

An autonomous AI agent that runs every weekday morning, scrapes LinkedIn for fresh job postings, scores them against your profile, and delivers matched jobs with ready-to-send cold emails directly to your Google Sheet and inbox.

item.title: Why I Switched from WordPress to Hugo
item.description:
Why I Switched from WordPress to Hugo

I used WordPress for years before switching to Hugo. Static HTML, no database, no plugins, 100/100 Lighthouse. Here is why I am not going back.
item.content:encoded:
Why I Switched from WordPress to Hugo

I used WordPress for years before switching to Hugo. Static HTML, no database, no plugins, 100/100 Lighthouse. Here is why I am not going back.

item.title: Beginner guide for anyone coming from ChatGPT who has never touched Claude before
item.description:
Beginner guide for anyone coming from ChatGPT who has never touched Claude before

Go Claude!
item.content:encoded:
Beginner guide for anyone coming from ChatGPT who has never touched Claude before

Go Claude!

item.title: Chibisafe
item.description:
Chibisafe

Blazing fast file vault written in TypeScript!
item.content:encoded:
Chibisafe

Blazing fast file vault written in TypeScript!

item.title: Plex Prerolls
item.description:
Plex Prerolls

A script to automate management of Plex pre-rolls.
item.content:encoded:
Plex Prerolls

A script to automate management of Plex pre-rolls.
